title: Add config validator module in src/utils/
description: Create src/utils/configValidator.ts with a config validation module and co-located tests (src/utils/configValidator.test.ts) following the existing single-responsibility utility module pattern. Uses vitest 4.0.18 for testing. The validator should validate configuration objects and return Result<T, E> for explicit error handling, consistent with src/utils/result.ts.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility file in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts, typed interfaces, JSDoc comments, and @example sections
Result<T, E> discriminated union for explicit error handling — configValidator should return this type
Configurable utility module with typed options interface and retry logic
